rulings.Case Title: SAN KEUN LEE VS. JP MORGAN CHASE BANK NA BUSINESS ENTITY UNKNOWN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, November 16, 2009, line 21, DEFENDANTS JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A., AND, CALIFORNIA RECONVEYANCE COMPANY DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. The demurrer is sustained with ten days leave to amend as to relief based on Civil Code 1632 to give plaintiffs an opportunity, if they are able to allege who were the real estate brokers and how the accounts¿ complexity require an accounting absent a fiduciary relationship. The demurrer is overruled as to the relief based on Civil Code 2923.5. =(302/HEK)
